title: Established Organic Lawn Care & Pest Control  – Recurring Revenue
supportTraining: The current owner is offering training and support during the transition period. The new owner will also receive comprehensive training from the franchisor.
description:
For nearly two decades, this well-established residential lawn care and pest control company has built a loyal customer base across two exclusive service territories in the booming Houston metropolitan area. The business specializes in environmentally friendly, organic-based lawn treatments and pest control solutions that provide homeowners with a safer alternative to traditional chemical services.

With 744 active clients averaging more than six years in tenure, the business generates recurring revenue through seasonal fertilization and weed control programs, plus add-on services such as tree and shrub care, aeration, and fire ant/flea & tick treatments.

HIGHLIGHTS
• Recurring revenue model with predictable cash flow and low customer churn
• Two exclusive Houston-area territories with no direct competition of its kind in Texas
• Stable workforce of 3 field technicians and 1 office manager, reducing transition risk
• Low overhead operations supported by efficient scheduling, routing, and billing software
• Turnkey assets included: vehicles, equipment, technology systems, and warehouse space

Growth potential: untapped mosquito service line, expansion in underdeveloped territory, and digital marketing initiatives.

Seller financing is available on a case-by-case basis, subject to owner approval. Asking price $350,000 with 50% down for seller-carry.

Contact us now through the ad to obtain the link for the electronic confidentiality agreement and buyer registration. Upon completion of these forms, we will send you detailed information about the business for sale.
